layers.name: Layer A: support fixtures
layers.purpose: Analyzer, compiler, import, and packaging correctness for the frozen subset.
cases: supported constructs compile and package correctly
acceptance: no accidental acceptance of blocked features
stable support-class output in migration artifacts

layers.name: Layer B: semantic parity fixtures
layers.purpose: Runtime behavior parity for the supported subset.
acceptance: terminal outcome matches the equivalence contract
value and failure shape match the equivalence contract
replay on the pinned artifact succeeds without divergence

layers.name: Layer C: trust and failure fixtures
layers.purpose: Restart, failover, replay, backup, restore, and upgrade trust for the supported subset.
cases: mixed worker builds during rolling restart
pinned run plus new deployment coexistence
stale owner plus new build interaction
acceptance: fencing rules hold under takeover and duplicate delivery
replay and recovery outcomes are deterministic
mixed-version and mixed-build routing behave per contract
